scenes.title: The Burned Shore
scenes.biggestGap: Jaina's inland read still resolves into abstract tracking language instead of visible sled grooves and boot-spoor.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: Burned harbor rise over Daggercap Bay, with the inland line visible beyond the stripped camp.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Bread crust and crumbs in Jaina's hand against ash, pitch, grooves, and broken harness on the shore.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Sylvanas reads the bay like a battlefield after volleys stop and prices the trail by discipline failure.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Jaina's tracking answer must cash out in the north-west spoor they can already see.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: The file leaving the strand with the Wolfheart behind them and the inland track pulling them off the coast.

scenes.title: The March
scenes.biggestGap: Sylvanas's bodily warning gets diluted by summed-up system language instead of staying in teeth, skin, and the instinct to turn back.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: Attrition corridor inland through Dragonblight into Muradin's ice-block camp.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Snow crust, rime, snapped carts, dead soldier in plate, ice-block walls, forge vents, and the gate lever.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Sylvanas notices pace, footing, flanks, and the exact bodily cost the land extracts from Jaina and the line.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Jaina's magical read must stay tied to visible bends in spoor, smoke, and the camp ahead.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: The camp's ugly white ring and controlled entry turning travel pressure into briefing pressure.

scenes.title: The Ally
scenes.biggestGap: Briefing mostly holds, but it must stay under heat, ale, beard-rings, table grain, and the arithmetic of immediate departure.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: Siege-worn dwarven shelter inside Muradin's camp.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Brazier heat, metal-tasting ale, wet tabletop, beard-rings, and gear grabbed for the departure.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Sylvanas measures Muradin by usefulness, pace, and whether his read of the pair is accurate enough to matter.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Every mechanism line has to stay tied to a cup, table, ring-click, or departure prep.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: Muradin's hammer settling on its harness and the trio leaving before the camp can breathe.

scenes.title: Frostmourne
scenes.biggestGap: The cave sequence has several local slips into decorative metaphor or systems-talk that blunt the glacier, the inscription, the field behavior, and the extraction finish.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: Glacier seam, warning threshold, main chamber, and the downhill line back toward Muradin's camp.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Scraped runes, buried hammer, sabatons on ice, shard spray, harness straps, and Muradin's boots furrowing the snow.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Sylvanas translates magical wrongness into threshold refusal, attack lanes, and extraction arithmetic.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Jaina's warnings must describe what the cave and blade will physically do to a cast, not name combat abstractions.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: All-seven extraction, Light's Vengeance left in the drift, and the return to the ice-block ring for handoff.
